text: You stand inside **The Moss Door**. The air is thick with green light, soft earth, and the smell of rain on ferns. Lanterns hang from ancient branches. A moss-covered fox sits beside you, wearing a brass tag that reads: **FRIEND OF THE ONE WHO CHOSE GREEN**. It looks up and says, *"You came back."*

doors.name: The Burrow Door
doors.label: A
doors.description: Small, root-framed, warm. Smells of rain and old blankets.

doors.name: The Sunken Bell Door
doors.label: B
doors.description: Half underwater. Rings softly when no one touches it.

doors.name: The Little Crown Door
doors.label: C
doors.description: Tiny golden door in a tree stump, widening when trusted.
